title: Discord integration Luckperms
description: Combining Discord roles and Luckperms groups
body:
This modification is a fork of [DiscordLoom](https://modrinth.com/mod/discordloom) created by [Dreaming Codes](https://modrinth.com/user/Dreaming-Codes)

This version was created only for 1.20.1 no updates and new versions are planned.
You can contact **luciferrium** in Discord to create the version you need.


![logo](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/f2a6ea266b6c8e39ca5b48d16ac1124d797cfb3c.png)

The mod allows you to fully synchronise Discord and Minecraft server based on the Luckperms permissions modification.

What a mod can do:
1. Synchronisation of Discord roles with Luckperms groups
2. change Discord username to the name specified in Minecraft
3. By enabling the function: mandatoryVCChannels = [] specifying in it the id of the voice chat of your server, for example mandatoryVCChannels = [‘435457687658665856856’], then players will be able to log in to the server and play on it while they are online in this voice chat.

The mod is fully tested on the following modpacks:
1. Forge - Craft to Exile 2
2. Fabric - Prominence II

Work with other mods and modpacks may not be stable.

Instructions for proper installation:


<details>
<summary>1. Bot creation</summary>

You need to go to [https://discord.com/developers/applications/](https://discord.com/developers/applications/)
Click on the New application button
![Replace this with a description](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/71cb8e36fb0b4d9beefba43749f52439f412e617.png)
Come up with a name for the bot
![Replace this with a description](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/877ac5a9f44ce9c119e7d1f92e47cada8b53ef87.png)
The bot configuration menu will open, you need to go to the OAuth2 section
![Replace this with a description](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/3c3d3d87c90cf68282d1799ae49615ae221bae68.png)
Get Client Id and Client Secret
![Replace this with a description](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/808e06ade5ce7abc2eb3f3cfd6c5e2d9578dea90.png)
The following link should be added to the Redirects line: **http://localhost:8000/callback**
![Replace this with a description](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/726bfc5820c317548dbcaad7c4c9487efddfbac8.png)
Generate a link to the bot invitation by setting the Bot and Administrator parameters
![Replace this with a description](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/4bc369af4b1a4791e814c5a908de88d8642674e4.png)
![Replace this with a description](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/3ca19a6ba0890c261263e8e38c25b212b12591b5.png)
Then go to the Bot tab and set the parameters as shown on the image
![Replace this with a description](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/94afe2adb9639c3844df466f96ea8b340f4cc683.png)
Congratulations! You have successfully created and added a bot to your Discord server. Now let's move on to the next step.

</details>




<details>
<summary>2. Installing the mod on the server, setting the configuration, configuring Luckperms</summary>


After you download the mod, add it to your server and try to run it, you will get an error. This means that the configuration has been created and it needs to be configured.

Go to the path config/discordloom-common.toml

Open this file with any text editor and start filling it in.
![Replace this with a description](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/1ccfd1c3f521038be0fab981b54d9b5e15fd3c21.png)

The checkForGuildsOnJoin parameter is the id of your Discord community, to get it you must be an administrator of the community, click the community icon and click Copy Server ID.
![Replace this with a description](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/f8e894756323eb617ad5047e140c97a46a3e9520.png)

Don't forget to set the role created by the bot to the first role in the list of server roles.

![Replace this with a description](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/6cd60fa0679cb27c89d7aee7c516bbcfd83ebaec.png)

After filling out the configuration file, if you have entered all the parameters correctly, the mod will allow you to start the server. After the first login to the server, you will be prompted to link your Discord account and Minecraft account.

![Replace this with a description](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/69f42b82e5c9da4626b358d0e1f5e63c5373aaa1.png)

You will see a window where you need to allow the bot to manage your usernames on the server and synchronise your accounts

![Replace this with a description](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/dfa40e30f6b3cec2bbcea39c8c92f17d5d096f1e_0.webp)

Now your Discord name will become the same as in Minecraft, and Luckperms will give all groups matching Discord.

Now I will briefly tell you how to create a Luckperms group that will match Discord.

To do this in the server console type lp editor and open the graphical editor on the link given to you.

![Replace this with a description](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/6ad29507ca273438fa189e4193e9319702828d50.png)

Click the + next to the Group button.

In the window that appears, you need to type discordloom:idrolediscord in the group name.

To get idrolediscord you need to click on the role you created and click Copy role id. 
Your group name in Luckperms should look like this: discordloom:3948293850239502395023509.

![Replace this with a description](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/0c98e06e870966a09e91f6af66f4899418b7270f.png)

![Replace this with a description](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/38347f92f563abc973b0e0bc9fb436a42efd6103.png)

That's it, you have successfully integrated your Discord with your Minecraft server. If you still have any questions or need help, join my Discord community: [https://minecraft.press/](https://minecraft.press/)

</details>
